info.title: Fenergo Nebula Product Policy Command
info.description: Policy Command API is part of FenX eco-system to manage Requirement Sets, Requirements, Data Groups and Data Group Fields Instances. All the operations require valid access token obtained from Identity service.

post.description:
• Creates a new product requirement set with a first draft version.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

202.description: Success. Product requirement set created

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.description:
• Creates a new version of an existing product requirement set.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: Create product requirement set version request

202.description: Success. Product requirement set version created

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Product requirement set with given id does not exist

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.summary: Create product requirement set version from provided set id
post.description:
• Creates a new version of an existing product requirement set.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the latest published product requirement set data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: Version number to create new draft from

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

202.description: Success. Product requirement set version created

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Product requirement set with given id does not exist

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

put.description:
Updates an existing product requirement set version. Only draft and rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: Update product requirement set version request

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Product requirement set with given id does not exist

409.description: Conflict saving changes in expected version

messages.message: There are conflicts that cannot be resolved automatically, get latest and apply your changes

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

delete.description:
• Deletes the selected version of an existing product requirement set.
  • If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as deleted and become unavailable.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationDelete

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

202.description: Success. Product requirement set version deleted

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Product requirement set with given id does not exist

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

post.description:
• Clones the selected version of an existing product requirement set and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned product requirement set version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ProductConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: Clone Product requirement set version request

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Product requirement set with given id does not exist

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

businessRelated.description: Collection of business related access layers

requirementSetId.description: Id of the cloned product requirement set

expectedRequirementCount.description: Expected number of requirements of the cloned product requirement set

CloneProductRequirementSetVersionRespons.description: Request DTO representing clone product requirement set data

data.description: Request DTO representing clone product requirement set data

scopingRuleSetId.description: Id of the cloned scoping rule set

expectedRuleCount.description: Expected number of rules of the cloned scoping rule set

CloneScopingRuleSetVersionResponse.description: Request DTO representing clone scoping rule set data

data.description: Request DTO representing clone scoping rule set data

setId.description: The UiD of the data requirement set

conditions.description: Conditions under which the requirement set can be applied

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

signees.description: The defined list of signees for the version

CommonRequirementSetDto.description: Request DTO representing requirement set data

customActionProperties.description:
Properties which can be passed to a custom action function in the UI, provided as
basic string key-value pairs to allow action functions to be created generically.

DataFieldDto.description: Request DTO representing data field metadata

dateLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set date range

disallowTodaysDate.description: Validation rule that does not allow todays date

DataValidationRulesDto.description: Request DTO representing validation data metadata

formulaString.description: Formula string will be used to perform calculation

id.description: The UiD of the created item

ItemCreatedDto.description: Response DTO representing created Item Instance

data.description: Response DTO representing created Item Instance

partyCount.description: What is the minimum number of relationships that need to be added in order for this requirement to be fulfilled?

idvPartyCount.description: What is the minimum number of relationships that need to be ID&Vd in order for this requirement to be fulfilled?

idvAllParties.description: Do all entities that meet the criteria of this requirement need to be ID&Vd?

id.description: The UiD of the ownership validation rule

setId.description: The UiD of the requirement set

ownershipValidationData.description: Ownership Validation Data - set of validation rules specific to ownership requirement

requirementSetId.description: The UiD of the requirement set

description.example: This is the client first name

order.description: Requirement the order which the field will appears

isCoreDefinition.description:
Requirement is defined as core
and cannot be deleted or altered

isIndexable.description: Requirement is data indexed for search flag

isSecondaryIdentifier.description: Is this requirement used to search and filter on products

ownershipDataKey.description: The datakey that is used to identify this requirement

sourceEntityType.description: Any of the related party entity types selected can be counted toward this requirement

directAssociationsOnly.description: When enabled, only related parties directly associated to the main client entity will be counted towards this requirement

idvOn.description: Is there an ID&V element applicable to this requirement?

idvName.description: Name of the ID&V requirement and label which will be applied to the ID&V chip

idvTooltip.description: Tooltip description of the ID&V requirement
idvTooltip.example: At Least one CEO, CFO, COO, CTO, Board Member or Executive Director must be ID&Vd

documentAccessLayers.description: Access layers determining the access to the document

fieldAccessLayers.description: Access layers determining the access to the field

defaultDateType.description: Default Date Type e.g. Standard Default Value

isTotalProductColumn.description: Specifies is field is going to be displayed with a total summation

uiDecoration.description:
Determines how the requirement should be rendered
<example>null</example>

ProductRequirementDto.description: Request DTO representing product requirement metadata

data.description: Request DTO representing product requirement metadata

created.description: The creation date of the version (Read-only)

ProductRequirementSetDto.description: Request DTO representing product requirement set data

data.description: Request DTO representing product requirement set data
Request DTO representing product requirement set data

version.description:
Current version of Data Group aggregate where the changes needs to be applied. This parameter is required 
to guarantee consistency and conflicts detection. If it is not provided, it will save new changes
on top of latest without conflicts checking

defaultDataProtectionJurisdiction.description: Default data protection jurisdiction for requirement set

to guarantee consistency and conflicts detection. If it is not provided, it will save new changes
on top of latest without conflicts checking
